goal: Search for a best predictor using runtime-shaped multi-horizon labels, then decide whether learned models deserve product integration.
coreHypothesis: The previous SmoothPredictor was trained on a narrow future-time convention. A model trained across product target-correction horizons may reduce visible lag without causing stop-side overshoot.

dataPolicy.reason: The manifest provides an existing train/validation/test/robustness split over MotionLab ZIP files with trace and alignment truth.

runtimeHorizonPolicy.displayOffsetMilliseconds: integer-like sweep from -32 to +32, first run every 4ms

promotionGate.offline: A learned candidate must beat simple velocity baselines and current SmoothPredictor on visual error while not increasing stopLeadP99 or stationaryJitterP95.
promotionGate.closedLoop: Calibrator validation is only worth running after the offline gate passes.
